note: seq=32: v4 cache-bust puller self-upgrade -- kills the stale raw-CDN manifest fetch for good. selftest-gated + v3 auto-rollback.

steps.note: seq=32: v4 CACHE-BUST self-upgrade. Patches the puller's BRAIN_URL manifest fetch to send Cache-Control:no-cache + ?cb=$(date +%s) so the box NEVER applies a stale cached manifest again (the recurring stall root cause). Once installed, all future seqs fetch fresh and apply on the next cycle.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; p='/opt/atlas/staging/atlas-autopull.v4.sh'; want='641503196f86bee86a374fc1e6c30f185ed76da606f00215af4258285e5788c5'; got=hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest(); sys.exit(0 if got==want else 'SHA MISMATCH got='+got)"
/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os; s='/opt/atlas/staging/atlas-autopull.v4.sh'; d='/opt/atlas/autopull/atlas-autopull.sh'; os.chmod(s,0o755); os.replace(s,d); print('installed cache-bust v4')"
